verse.name: C1
verse.lines: I will sing I will worship You I will bow myself down Humbly at Your throne I will give anything I will give everything To You alone

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: I long to be the bride that You're returning for Dressed in garments white and wrinkle free I have no earthy love that I am holding to For You're the One who means everything to me

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: You are the faithful God who keeps Your covenant There's not one thing You've said You haven't done And someday when I see You standing face to face My praise for You will only have begun!
